title: ourisia goulandiana
intro: Ourisia goulandiana, also known as New Zealand gentian or Goulandina's gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family. It is native to New Zealand and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory infections, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and boosted immune function. Ourisia goulandiana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herb for herbal remedies.
